issues.comment: annotationTag type is undefined but used in slice creation, causing compilation failure.
min() function requires Go 1.21+ but project may be using older Go version, causing compilation failure if Go version is < 1.21.
Manual ID assignment ID: int64(i + 1) may conflict with database auto-increment behavior, potentially causing primary key constraint violations or unexpected behavior.
r.log.Error() logs normal cleanup operations at Error level but should use Debug or Info level since this is not an error condition.
r.log.Error() logs successful cleanup at Error level but should use Debug or Info level since this is not an error condition.
r.log.Error() logs normal tag cleanup operations at Error level but should use Debug or Info level since this is not an error condition.
r.log.Error() logs successful tag cleanup at Error level but should use Debug or Info level since this is not an error condition.
r.log.Error() logs normal tag orphan operations at Error level but should use Debug or Info level since this is not an error condition.
r.log.Error() logs successful tag orphan cleanup at Error level but should use Debug or Info level since this is not an error condition.
Cleanup interval changed from 10 minutes to 1 minute increases cleanup frequency by 10x, potentially causing significant performance impact in production if not intentional.
